The '''PL-90 luxury speeder''' was a large [[Ubrikkian Repulsorlift Manufacturing|Ubrikkian]] [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] designed for wealthy individuals and their entourages. It was one of the most popular speeders on the market among the upper class during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Characteristics==
The PL-90 was designed to be the ultimate in comfort, and had a price tag to match. It had four rows of seats including three bench seats, all padded, and single seats for the driver and a passenger in the front row. It also boasted state of the art [[Acceleration compensator/Legends|inertial dampening]] technology proving a smooth and easy ride for its passengers. The PL-90 sacrificed speed in favor of comfort.

==History==
[[File:Coolspeeder.jpg|left|thumb|Lucien Draay's speeder.]]

Unlike other speeders of the time, the PL-90 was never designed for any sort of military use, lacking the speed necessary for combat applications. It was instead favored by wealthy [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] and politicians. For this reason it lacked the widespread appeal of several other faster, less opulent speeders and [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]].

The prominent [[Draay family]] owned several PL-90 luxury speeders for use at their [[Draay Estate|estate]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Lucien Draay]] used one to transport the [[First WatchCircle]] around the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|city-planet]].
